index.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<title>Space Invaders</title>
<style>*{margin:0;padding:0}body{background:#000;display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:center;height:100vh}canvas{display:block}</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="c" width="600" height="400"></canvas>
<script>
const cv=document.getElementById('c'),ctx=cv.getContext('2d');
const W=600,H=400;
let player,bullets,enemies,enemyBullets,bunkers,lives,score,dead,won,wave;
let keys={},shootCooldown=0,enemyDir=1,enemyTimer=0,enemyDropped=false;
function initWave(){
  enemies=[];
  for(let r=0;r<4;r++)for(let c=0;c<5;c++){
    enemies.push({x:100+c*80,y:60+r*50,alive:true,row:r});
  }
  enemyDir=1;enemyDropped=false;
}
function init(){
  player={x:280,y:360,w:40,h=12};
  bullets=[];enemyBullets=[];
  lives=3;score=0;dead=false;won=false;wave=1;
  bunkers=[];
  for(let b=0;b<3;b++){
    const bx=120+b*140;
    for(let r=0;r<3;r++)for(let c=0;c<5;c++){
      bunkers.push({x:bx+c*12,y:310+r*8,alive:true});
    }
  }
  initWave();
}
document.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{
  keys[e.key]=true;
  if(e.key===' ')e.preventDefault();
});
document.addEventListener('keyup',e=>{keys[e.key]=false;});
function update(){
  if(dead||won)return;
  if(keys['ArrowLeft'])player.x=Math.max(0,player.x-4);
  if(keys['ArrowRight'])player.x=Math.min(W-40,player.x+4);
  if(keys[' ']&&shootCooldown<=0){
    bullets.push({x:player.x+20,y:player.y});shootCooldown=15;
  }
  if(shootCooldown>0)shootCooldown--;
  bullets=bullets.filter(b=>{
    b.y-=8;
    bunkers.forEach(bn=>{
      if(bn.alive&&b.x>bn.x&&b.x<bn.x+10&&b.y>bn.y&&b.y<bn.y+8){bn.alive=false;b.y=-10;}
    });
    enemies.forEach(e=>{
      if(e.alive&&b.x>e.x&&b.x<e.x+30&&b.y>e.y&&b.y<e.y+24){e.alive=false;score+=10*(4-e.row);b.y=-10;}
    });
    return b.y>0;
  });
  enemyTimer++;
  const alive=enemies.filter(e=>e.alive).length;
  const speed=Math.max(4,20-wave*2-Math.floor((20-alive)/4));
  if(enemyTimer>=speed){
    enemyTimer=0;
    let hitEdge=false;
    enemies.forEach(e=>{
      if(e.alive){e.x+=enemyDir*8;if(e.x<=10||e.x>=W-40)hitEdge=true;}
    });
    if(hitEdge){
      enemyDir=-enemyDir;
      enemies.forEach(e=>{if(e.alive)e.y+=16;});
    }
    if(Math.random()<0.02*wave&&alive>0){
      const ae=enemies.filter(e=>e.alive);
      const shot=ae[Math.floor(Math.random()*ae.length)];
      enemyBullets.push({x:shot.x+15,y:shot.y+24});
    }
  }
  enemyBullets=enemyBullets.filter(b=>{
    b.y+=4;
    bunkers.forEach(bn=>{
      if(bn.alive&&b.x>bn.x&&b.x<bn.x+10&&b.y>bn.y&&b.y<bn.y+8){bn.alive=false;b.y=H+10;}
    });
    if(b.x>player.x&&b.x<player.x+40&&b.y>player.y&&b.y<player.y+12){
      lives--;b.y=H+10;
      if(lives<=0){dead=true;}
    }
    if(enemies.some(e=>e.alive&&e.y>320)){dead=true;}
    return b.y<H;
  });
  if(enemies.every(e=>!e.alive)){wave++;if(wave>5)won=true;else initWave();}
}
function drawEnemy(e,type){
  ctx.save();
  const colors=['#ff5252','#ff4081','#e040fb','#40c4ff'];
  ctx.fillStyle=colors[type%4];
  if(type===0){
    ctx.fillRect(e.x+5,e.y,20,6);ctx.fillRect(e.x+2,e.y+6,26,8);
    ctx.fillRect(e.x,e.y+14,10,6);ctx.fillRect(e.x+20,e.y+14,10,6);
    ctx.fillRect(e.x+2,e.y+8,4,6);ctx.fillRect(e.x+24,e.y+8,4,6);
    ctx.fillStyle='#fff';ctx.fillRect(e.x+8,e.y+2,6,4);ctx.fillRect(e.x+16,e.y+2,6,4);
  }else if(type===1){
    ctx.fillRect(e.x+3,e.y+2,24,6);ctx.fillRect(e.x,e.y+8,30,8);
    ctx.fillRect(e.x+4,e.y+16,8,4);ctx.fillRect(e.x+18,e.y+16,8,4);
    ctx.fillStyle='#fff';ctx.fillRect(e.x+8,e.y+3,6,4);ctx.fillRect(e.x+16,e.y+3,6,4);
  }else if(type===2){
    ctx.fillRect(e.x+2,e.y,26,8);ctx.fillRect(e.x,e.y+8,30,6);
    ctx.fillRect(e.x+2,e.y+14,6,6);ctx.fillRect(e.x+22,e.y+14,6,6);
    ctx.fillRect(e.x+10,e.y+20,10,4);
    ctx.fillStyle='#fff';ctx.fillRect(e.x+8,e.y+2,6,4);ctx.fillRect(e.x+16,e.y+2,6,4);
  }else{
    ctx.fillRect(e.x+5,e.y,20,4);ctx.fillRect(e.x+2,e.y+4,26,8);
    ctx.fillRect(e.x,e.y+12,30,6);ctx.fillRect(e.x+4,e.y+18,6,4);ctx.fillRect(e.x+20,e.y+18,6,4);
    ctx.fillStyle='#fff';ctx.fillRect(e.x+8,e.y+6,5,5);ctx.fillRect(e.x+17,e.y+6,5,5);
  }
  ctx.restore();
}
function draw(){
  ctx.fillStyle='#000';ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H);
  for(let i=0;i<80;i++){
    ctx.fillStyle=`rgba(255,255,255,${0.2+Math.sin(i*137)*0.3})`;
    const sx=(i*73)%W,sy=(i*47)%H;
    ctx.fillRect(sx,sy,1,1);
  }
  enemies.forEach(e=>{
    if(!e.alive)return;
    drawEnemy(e,e.row);
  });
  bunkers.forEach(bn=>{
    if(!bn.alive)return;
    ctx.fillStyle='#4caf50';
    ctx.fillRect(bn.x,bn.y,10,8);
  });
  bullets.forEach(b=>{
    ctx.fillStyle='#fff';
    ctx.fillRect(b.x-1,b.y,3,8);
  });
  enemyBullets.forEach(b=>{
    ctx.fillStyle='#ff5252';
    ctx.fillRect(b.x-2,b.y,4,8);
  });
  ctx.save();
  ctx.shadowColor='#4fc3f7';ctx.shadowBlur=10;
  ctx.fillStyle='#4fc3f7';
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.moveTo(player.x+20,player.y);
  ctx.lineTo(player.x,player.y+12);
  ctx.lineTo(player.x+40,player.y+12);
  ctx.closePath();ctx.fill();
  ctx.restore();
  ctx.fillStyle='#fff';ctx.font='bold 16px monospace';ctx.textAlign='left';
  ctx.fillText('Score: '+score,10,20);
  ctx.textAlign='center';ctx.fillText('Wave: '+wave,300,20);
  ctx.textAlign='right';ctx.fillText('Lives: '+lives,590,20);
  ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.3)';ctx.font='11px monospace';
  ctx.textAlign='center';ctx.fillText('←→ move  SPACE shoot',300,395);
  if(dead||won){
    ctx.fillStyle='rgba(0,0,0,0.75)';ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H);
    ctx.textAlign='center';
    ctx.fillStyle=won?'#ffd600':'#f44336';
    ctx.font='bold 48px monospace';
    ctx.fillText(won?'YOU WIN!':'GAME OVER',W/2,180);
    ctx.fillStyle='#fff';ctx.font='24px monospace';
    ctx.fillText('Score: '+score,W/2,240);
    ctx.fillStyle='#aaa';ctx.font='16px monospace';
    ctx.fillText('Reload to play again',W/2,290);
  }
}
function loop(){update();draw();requestAnimationFrame(loop);}
init();loop();
</script>
</body>
</html>
